posts.author: RossMac (Ross Macgillivray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Want to be able to display a message on screen if certain conditions are not met, in order to alert the user to the particular requirements.

What are you trying to achieve

Want to be able to prompt user to enter a value in a column when attempting to change the status of an item.
